name: Paella a La Valenciana
recipeIngredient: 1 Broiler/fryer, cut into 9 pieces (3 ½ lb)
1 medium Onion, peeled and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, deep skillet or paella pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the chorizo sausage and salt pork (if using), cooking until browned.
3. Stir in the chopped onion, minced garlic, paprika, and saffron threads. Cook for 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
4. Add the rice to the skillet and stir to coat evenly with the oil and spices.
5. Pour in the chicken stock and white wine (if using), ensuring it covers the bottom of the pan by about an inch.
6. Season with salt, pepper, and lemon juice. Stir gently.
7. Scatter the shrimp and clams on top of the rice mixture.
8. Cover the skillet with a tight-fitting lid and place under the broiler.
9. Cook until the liquid has mostly evaporated and the rice is tender, about 20-25 minutes.
10. Remove from heat and let sit for 5 minutes before serving. Enjoy!
